items.title: Bayern, Germany star Gnabry to miss World Cup
items.summary: Bayern Munich and Germany winger Serge Gnabry has confirmed that he will miss this summer's World Cup.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: South Africa bowl first in pursuit of T20I series win against India
items.summary: South Africa made two changes to their team, while India made three
